idea-plugin.name: Commit Generator
idea-plugin.description:
Generate conventional git commit messages instantly using a local Ollama model — no API key, no cloud, fully private.

Features:
  • Reads your staged diff and produces a single-line type(scope): description commit message
  • Works with any locally running Ollama model (llama3, mistral, codellama, etc.)
  • One-click copy to clipboard
Usage: Stage your files, open the Commit Generator tool window, and click Generate.
Configure the Ollama URL and model in Settings → Tools → Commit Generator.
